title: Xtra Fresh Ukrainian Eggs Frittata
description: A fresh and flaky Ukrainian dish featuring a hint of hot sauce, perfect for a weekend brunch.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the diced onions and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, hot sauce, salt, and pepper.
Add the chopped dill to the egg mixture and stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture over the onions in the skillet and cook until the edges start to set, about 2 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake until the eggs are set and the frittata is golden brown, about 15 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Use a spatula to loosen the edges of the frittata from the skillet and slide it onto a plate.
Let the frittata rest for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
